I understand that my card may be charged up to 100% of the service cost in the event of a no-show or cancellation with less than 24 hours notice. I consent to Holis Wellness Center retaining this information in accordance with their privacy policy and for any charges related to services rendered.

services.title: Treatments & Therapies
services.subtitle: Our massage therapy treatments are designed to relieve muscle tension, reduce stress, and support overall wellness. Using techniques such as deep tissue, Swedish, and therapeutic massage, each session is tailored to your body’s needs to improve circulation, ease pain, and promote deep relaxation.
services.selectCategory: Please select a category to view treatments

intro.title: Treatments & Therapies
intro.body: At Holis Wellness Center, our treatments and therapies are designed to support your physical, emotional, and energetic well-being. We offer a wide range of holistic services including massage therapy, organic facials, body treatments, and personalized wellness programs. Whether you're seeking stress relief, pain reduction, or skin rejuvenation, our expert therapists tailor each experience to your needs.

massage.title: Massage Therapy
massage.body: Our massage therapy services combine traditional and modern techniques to relieve muscle tension, improve circulation, and promote deep relaxation. Choose from deep tissue, Swedish, and therapeutic massage options designed to reduce stress, support recovery, and enhance overall wellness.

facials.title: Organic Facials
facials.body: Our organic facials use natural, toxin-free products to nourish and restore your skin. These treatments improve hydration, reduce signs of aging, and promote a radiant complexion using gentle yet effective botanical ingredients suitable for all skin types.

body.title: Body Treatments
body.body: Our body treatments are designed to detoxify, exfoliate, and rejuvenate the skin. From body scrubs to wraps and lymphatic therapies, each session enhances circulation, improves skin texture, and supports full-body wellness.

holistic.title: Holistic Therapy
holistic.body: Our holistic therapies focus on balancing the mind and body through integrative techniques that support emotional well-being, energy alignment, and deep relaxation. These treatments are ideal for those seeking a more mindful approach to wellness.

benefits.title: Benefits of Our Treatments
items: Relieve muscle tension and chronic pain

items.q: What is the best massage for stress relief?
items.a: Pure Bliss massage and Somato Awareness System are ideal options to reduce stress and create an experience that nourishes our capacity to maintain ease.

items.q: How often should I get a facial?
items.a: For optimal skin health, we recommend a facial every 2 to 4 weeks depending on your skin type and goals.

items.q: what are the main benefit of Holistic therapy ?
items.a: Holistic therapy can help improve overall wellbeing , the main discomfort that can be addressed are sleeping disorders, joint pain, migraines , emotional distress, low energy and more

local.title: Wellness Center in Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
local.body: Located in Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica, Holis Wellness Center is a trusted destination for massage therapy, organic facials, and holistic wellness treatments. We proudly serve clients seeking relaxation, rejuvenation, and personalized care in a calm and welcoming environment.

blog.metaDescription: Read wellness, mindfulness, yoga, breathwork, retreats, and holistic therapy articles from Holis Wellness Center.

education.sasSubheading: Professional Training for Conscious Therapeutic Massage
education.sasIntro1: The Somato Awareness System™ (SAS) is an advanced training method that integrates somatic awareness, holistic anatomy, and therapeutic massage into a powerful and intelligent treatment approach.
education.sasIntro2: Rather than simply learning techniques, therapists learn how to understand the body, assess each client, and design personalized treatments.
education.sasIntro3: The system transforms massage into a precise therapeutic dialogue between therapist and body, creating deeper and longer-lasting results.
education.sasIntro4: The program is structured in three progressive levels, guiding therapists from foundational awareness to advanced therapeutic mastery.
education.hoursDirect: • 48 hours of direct training with the facilitator
education.hoursPractice: • 12 hours of supervised and independent practice
education.practiceNote: A minimum one-week practice period is required between training visits.
education.couplesIntro: Our workshops explore therapeutic touch and couples massage techniques, self-care practices, aromatherapy basics, and mindful relaxation methods that support physical ease, emotional balance, and meaningful connection.

level1.title: Somato Awareness System Level 1
level1.subtitle: Foundations of Somatic Awareness
level1.intro: SAS Level 1 establishes the essential foundations of the Somato Awareness System™. Participants develop body awareness, ergonomic working habits, and an understanding of the body's connective tissue system. Therapists begin learning how to listen to the body through touch and recognize how tissues adapt and respond.
level1.learn3: Fundamentals of fascia and connective tissue
level1.practice1: Develop daily self-care routines including self-massage, conscious movement, and breathing practices.
level1.practice2: Learn efficient posture and biomechanics for safe and sustainable table work.
level1.practice3: Explore the connective tissue network and its role in structural balance.
level1.practice4: Practice massage techniques that cultivate somatic awareness and therapeutic intention.
level1.result: By the end of SAS 1, therapists work with greater body awareness, improved ergonomics, and a deeper understanding of connective tissue.

level2.title: Somato Awareness System Level 2
level2.subtitle: Assessment & Personalized Treatment
level2.intro: SAS Level 2 introduces kinesiological testing and myofascial integration, allowing therapists to develop more precise and personalized treatments. Therapists learn how to read the body's responses, identify functional patterns, and adapt treatments in real time.
level2.practice1: Learn to perform kinesiological testing to guide treatment decisions.
level2.practice2: Identify tension patterns within body segments.
level2.practice3: Work along myofascial lines to integrate distant areas of the body.
level2.practice4: Apply aromatherapy as a therapeutic support tool.
level2.result: At the end of SAS 2, therapists are able to assess the body more accurately and design treatments tailored to each client's needs.

level3.title: Somato Awareness System Level 3
level3.subtitle: Advanced Integration & Therapeutic Mastery
level3.intro: SAS Level 3 integrates all elements of the system into a complete and advanced therapeutic approach. Therapists learn to combine holistic anatomy, nervous system awareness, and manual techniques to create highly effective treatments.
level3.practice1: Apply advanced tissue release techniques along myofascial pathways.
level3.practice2: Work with the body's diaphragms and structural planes.
level3.practice3: Integrate nervous system awareness into therapeutic touch.
level3.practice4: Design and perform a complete Somato Awareness System™ treatment session.
level3.result: By the end of SAS 3, therapists are able to deliver a full SAS therapeutic treatment, combining assessment, testing, and advanced manual work. Participants receive the Somato Awareness System™ Certificate of Training upon successful completion.
